About Us

Building India's water-secure infrastructure

We are an engineering-led waste water and infrastructure company combining proven process technology with sustainable design and digital intelligence.

Company

About Us

KHM Infra Innovations Pvt. Ltd. is a dynamic, new-generation infrastructure and engineering consultancy company headquartered in Bhugaon, Maharashtra. Established with the mission of delivering precision-engineered, sustainable, and socially impactful infrastructure solutions, KHM Infra provides end-to-end services across the full project lifecycle — from initial feasibility and survey through design, DPR preparation, project management, and long-term operation & maintenance.

Working closely with government agencies, municipal corporations, urban development authorities, public health engineering departments, and private developers, KHM Infra is positioned to serve India's rapidly growing infrastructure demands across multiple critical sectors.

CIN U71100PN2026PTC255526

Mission

Engineer sustainable water systems for every community we serve.

Vision

India's most trusted partner for sustainable water and wastewater infrastructure.

Sustainability

Low-carbon designs and circular water principles.

Excellence

Compliance-first, lifecycle-optimised engineering.

Company

Our Vision

To be India's most trusted partner for water and wastewater treatment—building a future where clean water and responsible effluent management are accessible to every industry and community we serve.

We envision a nation where industries, municipalities and institutions no longer struggle with unreliable treatment plants, regulatory non-compliance or rising operational costs. KHM Infra Innovations aims to lead that change by combining proven process engineering, in-house manufacturing at our Chakan facility, and smart monitoring so every project delivers safe, efficient and long-lasting performance.

Our vision extends beyond equipment supply. We see ourselves as lifecycle partners—from design and fabrication to installation, commissioning and operation & maintenance—helping clients focus on their core business while we safeguard water quality and environmental standards.

Through continual investment in people, technology and quality systems, we strive to set the benchmark for integrity, innovation and customer satisfaction in the water and environmental infrastructure sector across India and global markets.

What we work toward

  • Sustainable, compliant water and wastewater solutions
  • Engineering excellence backed by in-house manufacturing
  • Long-term partnerships built on trust and transparency
  • Innovation in treatment technology and digital monitoring

    Launched proprietary IoT water analytics suite.
